label: FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions with expandable accordion

items.question: How is VibeCMS different from Contentful or Sanity?
items.answer: VibeCMS is built with a focus on editorial aesthetic and edge-native performance. While others provide generic blocks, we provide curated intelligence that helps you model data faster and more reliably.

items.question: Do you offer a free plan for developers?
items.answer: Yes! Our 'Spark' plan is free forever for personal projects and includes up to 5,000 records and 10GB of bandwidth.

items.question: Is VibeCMS SOC2 compliant?
items.answer: We are fully SOC2 Type II and GDPR compliant. Security is a first-class citizen in our architecture.
